name: Malon - Farmer's Bossy Daughter
description:
Lowkey don't have a quote so enjoy some Persona 5 music instead.

Skimsy you're the goat, it's only fair you get what you've been asking for.

And yes, friends, I adore the Persona series. Persona 5 Strikers was the first one I got and I thought I didn't like it at first. But after replaying it more recently, I fell in love with the whole series. So, I went back and bought P5R, downloaded Persona Q2 on my 3DS, and even did a shitty little cosplay of Joker that I will not be showing.

Damn, I want to cringe after writing that. All jokes aside, I really do love the Persona series and it's music, and I hope Lyn keeps working with Atlus because her voice is perfect for the songs.

Now about the bot. She's kinda like the boss' wife at work. She gets to boss workers around and anybody who shit talks her is tattled on to her father, the owner of the farm. But hey, she actually does hard work and isn't a bully or anything, she's just bossy.
creator: The Blevinator
